headline: Fox Corporation (FOXA) Slid in Q1 Following a Strong Performance
summary: Yachtman Asset Management released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for its AMG “Yacktman Focused Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Fund returned 10.37% for the first quarter, outperforming both the Russell 1000® Value Index and the S&P 500 Index, which returned 2.10% and -4.33%, respectively. The U.S. markets continue […]

headline: What Are Wall Street Analysts' Target Price for Fox Corporation Stock?
summary: While Fox has underperformed the broader market over the past year, Wall Street still appears optimistic about the stock.
